channel.title: Powershell on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Powershell on Classroom

item.title: Ps Enc
item.description: Understanding PowerShell encoding techniques — Base64 encoding, obfuscation methods, and decoding strategies for security analysis.

item.title: Awesome Powershell
item.description: Comprehensive PowerShell cheat sheet with essential commands, scripting techniques, and security-focused one-liners for penetration testing.
